name: Form

values.name: getErrors
values.comment:
Get all form errors as a list.

Empty list is returned if the form contains no errors.

values.name: init
values.type: Form.Settings.Settings -> String.String -> Json.Schema.Definitions.Schema -> Maybe.Maybe UiSchema.Internal.UiSchema -> Form.Form

values.name: setSchema
values.comment:
Swap the Schema of an existing form

Form data is reset. UI Schema is re-generated if it was auto-generated in the first place.

values.name: setUiSchema
values.comment:
Swap the UI Schema of an existing form

Form data is preserved.

name: Form.Error
comment:
Form field error handling

@docs Errors, ErrorValue, TextFormat

unions.name: ErrorValue
unions.comment: A single error value for a single field

aliases.name: Errors
aliases.comment: List of all errors in a form. One field may generate multiple entries.

aliases.name: Theme
aliases.type: { horizontalLayout : { cols : Basics.Int } -> Html.Attribute Basics.Never, horizontalLayoutItem : Html.Attribute Basics.Never, groupLabel : Html.Attribute Basics.Never, label : Html.Attribute Basics.Never, categorizationMenu : Html.Attribute Basics.Never, categorizationMenuItem : { focus : Basics.Bool } -> Html.Attribute Basics.Never, fieldGroup : Html.Attribute Basics.Never, fieldLabel : Html.Attribute Basics.Never, fieldDescription : Html.Attribute Basics.Never, fieldError : Html.Attribute Basics.Never, checkboxRow : Html.Attribute Basics.Never, radioEntry : { vertical : Basics.Bool } -> Html.Attribute Basics.Never, textInput : { trim : Basics.Bool, invalid : Basics.Bool } -> Html.Attribute Basics.Never, textArea : { trim : Basics.Bool, invalid : Basics.Bool } -> Html.Attribute Basics.Never, selectInput : { trim : Basics.Bool, invalid : Basics.Bool } -> Html.Attribute Basics.Never, checkboxInput : { invalid : Basics.Bool } -> Html.Attribute Basics.Never, radioInput : Html.Attribute Basics.Never, sliderInput : { trim : Basics.Bool } -> Html.Attribute Basics.Never, toggleInput : { checked : Basics.Bool } -> Html.Attribute Basics.Never, toggleKnob : { checked : Basics.Bool } -> Html.Attribute Basics.Never, group : Html.Attribute Basics.Never, disabledElems : Html.Attribute Basics.Never }

values.name: scrive
values.comment:
Simple form styling using Tailwind

This theme is as simple as possible while also having acceptable styling.

values.name: simpleTailwind
values.comment:
Simple form styling using Tailwind

This theme is as simple as possible while also having acceptable styling.

name: Json.Pointer
comment:
This module implements JSON Pointer as per [RFC 6901](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6901).

@docs Pointer, decode, fromString, toString, pointedValue

aliases.name: Pointer
aliases.comment:
Pointer path, represented as `List String`.

Pointers have a standardized text format. For example:

    "#/customers/0/name"

values.name: pointedValue
values.comment:
Get a sub-value which is pointed at by a pointer.

If the pointer does not point to an existing value, `Nothing` is returned.

name: UiSchema

values.name: fromString
values.comment: Validate and produce UI Schema from JSON String

values.name: generate
values.comment:
Generate a UI Schema from a Schema.

The generated UI schema contains vertical layout with controls for all primitive types.
